title: Fix async: true + mode(:shared) contradiction while preserving concurrency
prompt: The fixture at `test_fixtures/async_shared_contradiction.ex` has `use MyApp.DataCase, async: true` AND calls `mode(MyApp.Repo, {:shared, self()})`. This is a self-contradiction. Rewrite to `test/my_app/report_generator_test.exs`: remove the entire setup block's mode(:shared) call (keep `async: true`), and also do NOT re-add `mode(:shared)` or `async: false`. The DataCase template handles sandbox setup via `start_owner!` automatically. The module must keep `async: true` and have no sandbox function calls in its own setup.
tier_rationale: Requires recognizing that the DataCase already handles setup and removing the redundant/contradictory override.
